meaning: n.辛酸(事) 强烈,尖刻,辛辣
examples: The film contains moments of almost unbearable poignancy.
Of particular poignancy was the photograph of their son with his sisters, taken the day before he died.
The poignancy of Jordan retiring from his beloved basketball to play baseball and what had pushed him to make such a tough decision took me by surprise.
"The Unicef projects were the pinnacles of poignancy for us on the trip, " he said.
But that doesn't account for the more touchy-feely parts: poignancy and hope and a sense of place.
